remaining_annotations.text: Node.js 20 is deprecated. Actions target node20 but are being forced to run on node24.

browser_mobile_smoke.new_gating_tests_note: 3 gating tests × 5 viewports = 15. Pass on tablet-768x1024 (market table visible). Skip on 4 mobile viewports (mobile market layout has no table rows — intentional skip, not failure).

vercel_preview_build_fix.root_cause_fixed_step1: auth.ts:32 called readJwtSecret() at module initialization time. next build 'Collecting page data' phase threw JWT_SECRET environment variable is required. Fixed dc73940: lazy getSecret() — JWT_SECRET only read at request time.
vercel_preview_build_fix.root_cause_fixed_step2: rootDirectory:null in Vercel project metadata. Fixed e8be547: vercel.json at repo root pinning buildCommand=pnpm --filter neura-web build, outputDirectory=apps/web/.next, framework=nextjs — no longer requires operator dashboard config.
vercel_preview_build_fix.local_build_without_jwt_secret: PASS — 37 static pages generated, all routes collected

closure_smoke.next_build: PASS (37 static pages, no JWT_SECRET at build)
closure_smoke.api_smoke: PASS 6/6 (version returns real e8be547 SHA + branch + buildTime)

version_endpoint_observed.note: deploymentId/deploymentUrl filled by Vercel's auto-injected VERCEL_URL on real deploy — traceabilityComplete:true is achievable in production without any operator env-var setup.

remaining_gates_for_production_ready: Operator triggers Vercel preview deploy at e8be547+ → confirm preview URL works (vercel.json fix should unblock)
Real device smoke (iOS Safari + iOS or Android Chrome) at preview URL → REAL_MOBILE_PASS
Production deploy at e8be547+ → confirm aycmarket.com/api/v1/version returns traceabilityComplete:true → PROD_PASS

unknown — inspector 403 from sandbox. rootDirectory:null conflicts with VERCEL_ENV_SETUP.txt documented apps/web. Operator must set Root Directory and Build Command in Vercel dashboard.

real_mobile.reason: Sandbox cannot access real mobile device. Vercel preview has 3 consecutive FAILED deploys (no preview URL). Production network blocked (403). LAN requires physical Windows PC.

options_attempted.detail: 3 consecutive FAILED deploys. Latest (207962d, 23:46 UTC): nextCommitStatus: FAILED, previewUrl empty. Inspector: https://vercel.com/celebimehmethanifi-creators-projects/web/AQ3CkXTWMJGGuRcFVTTQorMYv8c3. Operator must fix Vercel project config.
Requires physical Windows PC C:\Users\mhani\Desktop\NEURA and real mobile on same Wi-Fi. Sandbox cannot do this.

production.vercel_preview_deploy: 3 consecutive FAILED deploys. Latest inspector: https://vercel.com/celebimehmethanifi-creators-projects/web/AQ3CkXTWMJGGuRcFVTTQorMYv8c3 (commit 207962d, 23:46 UTC). auth.ts JWT_SECRET build crash fixed in dc73940. Remaining failure: unknown, requires Vercel dashboard access.
production.live_version_observed: 403 Forbidden from sandbox — cannot confirm. Prior manual evidence: not_provided_by_cli_deploy.
production.root_cause_version: Vercel CLI deploy does not inject VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA/REF. All version-info.ts fields fall to CLI_FALLBACK sentinel.
production.fix_option_a: Enable Vercel Git integration → auto-injects VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA, VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF, VERCEL_DEPLOYMENT_ID, VERCEL_URL
production.fix_option_b: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD), NEXT_PUBLIC_BRANCH, BUILD_TIME, DEPLOYMENT_URL in Vercel dashboard env vars before CLI deploy
production.required_to_pass: aycmarket.com/api/v1/version must return traceabilityComplete:true with real commitSha/branch
production.sandbox_constraint: Cannot access Vercel dashboard or run production deploy. Cannot access production endpoints (403).

open_issues.issue: Browser/mobile emulation — 48 pass / 12 intentional skip / 0 fail. 3 new data-gating tests added.
mapLegacyStatus('fallback') → 'delayed' allowed trading metrics for fallback analysis. Fixed: → 'insufficient'. file: lib/markets/data-status.ts
hasSufficientData only excluded insufficient+no_data. demo and ayc_data could show LONG/SHORT and target/stop/RR. Fixed: whitelist live+delayed only. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
DirectionChip (LONG/SHORT) rendered unconditionally regardless of data quality. Fixed: gated by hasSufficientData. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
TextBoxes showed 'değerlendirme yapıldı' and technicalSummary when data was unsafe. Fixed: gate text content by hasSufficientData. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
Technical indicators (RSI/MACD/ATR/Support/Resistance) showed for insufficient data. Fixed: gated by hasSufficientData. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
dashboard/page.tsx hardcoded {a.isLive ? 'Canlı' : 'Demo'} — not through central getStatusLabel. Fixed: now uses getStatusLabel('live') / getStatusLabel('demo'). file: dashboard/page.tsx line 1639
vercel.json at repo root pinning buildCommand=pnpm --filter neura-web build, outputDirectory=apps/web/.next, framework=nextjs. Replaces rootDirectory:null dashboard requirement.

next.config.js: build-time git embedding (execSync git rev-parse HEAD/abbrev-ref HEAD + ISO buildTime) → NEXT_PUBLIC_COMMIT_SHA/_BRANCH/_BUILD_TIME consumed by version-info.ts. CLI deploy no longer needs operator env-var setup for traceability.
CI: 4 node20→24 informational annotations. FORCE flag applied (b2a555b). Permanent fix: action maintainers update action.yml. GitHub enforces June 2 2026.

Vercel preview: 3 prior FAILED deploys (a878330, 3c085a4, 207962d). Two root causes fixed: auth.ts JWT_SECRET crash (dc73940) + rootDirectory:null via vercel.json (e8be547). Operator: trigger redeploy at e8be547 and confirm preview URL — vercel.json should make it pass without dashboard changes.

REAL_MOBILE_PASS: FAIL — real iOS screenshots from aycmarket.com confirmed production failures (asset detail metrics shown for fallback/insufficient data, hardcoded Canlı badge). Source fixes committed (f96ff53). Re-test required on real device after Vercel preview at e8be547 succeeds. Manual steps: test-results/screenshots/phase3-real-mobile-smoke/MANUAL_STEPS.md.

PROD_PASS: FAIL — needs production deploy at e8be547+ and confirmation that aycmarket.com/api/v1/version returns traceabilityComplete:true. With e8be547's build-time git embedding, only Vercel's auto-injected VERCEL_URL is needed (always present on Vercel deploys).
